# Dogfooding Checklist

## Entry Experience
- [ ] Clear onboarding and instructions
- [ ] Immediate engagement on start
- [ ] Intuitive navigation

## Core Interactions
- [ ] Smooth and responsive UI
- [ ] Logical flow and state management
- [ ] Appropriate feedback for actions

## Fun & Engagement
- [ ] Progress tracking or scoring
- [ ] Social interaction prompts
- [ ] Variety in content/themes
- [ ] Celebration for achievements

## Usability Issues
- [ ] No confusing states or dead ends
- [ ] Accessible design
- [ ] Mobile-friendly

## Replayability
- [ ] Multiple rounds or modes
- [ ] Persistent progress
- [ ] Challenge escalation

## Overall Score
- Fun factor (1-10): ____
- Usability (1-10): ____
- Engagement (1-10): ____
